evals.prompt: Create a tech plan based on spec-012 for expiring password reset tokens after 30 minutes. Ask clarifying questions first, then save it under spec/tech-plans/ with the next available id.
evals.expected_output: A new tech plan file saved under spec/tech-plans/ with architecture, stack, security, and task preview sections.

evals.prompt: Based on user story us-005 for onboarding a new team member, create a tech plan. Ask clarifying questions before writing. Save the plan under spec/tech-plans/ with the next id.
evals.expected_output: A new tech plan file saved under spec/tech-plans/ aligned with the template and optional sections only if relevant.
